Diagnose HMM-SSF generative simulations

Source: R/diagnose_hmmssf.R
diagnose_hmmssf.Rd

Runs simulation methods, global movement diagnostics, HMM-specific state diagnostics, sharpness diagnostics, and compatibility-sharpness interpretations. The function returns a dashboard object rather than a single global goodness-of-fit score.

Usage

diagnose_hmmssf(
  fit,
  observed_track,
  n_sims = 99,
  methods = c("markov", "viterbi", "viterbi_tube", "posterior"),
  diagnostics = c("ud_wasserstein", "msd", "sinuosity", "barrier_crossing",
    "state_occupancy", "state_residence_time", "switching_rate", "transition_counts",
    "state_conditioned_msd", "state_conditioned_step_length",
    "state_conditioned_turning_angle", "state_conditioned_ud", "habitat_use_by_state"),
  sharpness = TRUE,
  parameter_uncertainty = TRUE,
  epsilon = NULL,
  barriers = NULL,
  raster_template = NULL,
  seed = NULL,
  ...
)

Arguments

fit

Fitted object or generic list object.

observed_track

Observed track.

n_sims

Number of simulations per method.

methods

Simulation methods.

diagnostics

Diagnostic names.

sharpness

Should sharpness be computed?

parameter_uncertainty

Should parameter uncertainty be requested?

epsilon

Viterbi tube tolerance.

barriers

Optional barriers for future barrier diagnostics.

raster_template

Optional raster template for future UD diagnostics.

seed

Optional seed.

...

Passed to simulation.

Value

Object of class "gmov_hmmssf_diagnostics".
